S.FORM: Oco hya' ga syuw na hiyal. kwara' kinghciyan niya' 10,180,000 sq km (maki' tay 1ginkgan kin wahci') Kinkhmayan kwara' squliq hya' ga 746,419,440. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
S.PHON: o ¶~ ®o ńßja Ē …£a s~…ējuw na ńßijal. kwara Ē kiŇčńß ¶~ ®ijan nija Ē **,***,*** s~…ēq km (maki Ē taj *…£ink…£an kin wańß ¶~ ®i Ē) kinkńßmajan kwara Ē s~…ēquliq ńßja Ē …£a ***,***,***. ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē
